scripts.dev: concurrently -n admin,user,naive,api -c green,cyan,magenta,yellow "npm run dev --prefix front/AdminClient" "npm run dev --prefix front/UserClient" "npm run dev --prefix front/UserNaiveUI" "npm run dev --prefix express-back"
scripts.install-all: npm install --prefix front/AdminClient && npm install --prefix front/UserClient && npm install --prefix front/UserNaiveUI && npm install --prefix express-back
